ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall recorded */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Evaporation recorded */,
  "sunshine" REAL /* Sunshine recorded */,
  "wind_gust_dir" TEXT /* Direction of wind gust */,
  "wind_gust_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of wind gust */,
  "wind_dir_9am" TEXT /* Direction of wind at 9am */,
  "wind_dir_3pm" TEXT /* Direction of wind at 3pm */,
  "wind_speed_9am" INTEGER /* Speed of wind at 9am */,
  "wind_speed_3pm" INTEGER /* Speed of wind at 3pm */,
  "humidity_9am" INTEGER /* Humidity at 9am */,
  "humidity_3pm" INTEGER /* Humidity at 3pm */,
  "pressure_9am" INTEGER /* Pressure at 9am */,
  "pressure_3pm" INTEGER /* Pressure at 3pm */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that generated the forecast */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Weather forecast text */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the forecast being accurate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that issued the warning */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the warning was issued */,
  "warning" TEXT /* Weather warning text */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., severe weather, high wind) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warning was issued */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warning was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data that the statistics are for */,
  "mean_humidity_9am" REAL /* Mean humidity at 9am */,
  "mean_temp_9am" REAL /* Mean temperature at 9am */,
  "mean_wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Mean wind gust speed */,
  "mean_wind_speed_9am" REAL /* Mean wind speed at 9am */,
  "mean_humidity_3pm" REAL /* Mean humidity at 3pm */,
  "mean_temp_3pm" REAL /* Mean temperature at 3pm */,
  "mean_wind_speed_3pm" REAL /* Mean wind speed at 3pm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical data was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_stats_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_median" (
  "median_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data that the medians are for */,
  "median_humidity_9am" REAL /* Median humidity at 9am */,
  "median_temp_9am" REAL /* Median temperature at 9am */,
  "median_wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Median wind gust speed */,
  "median_wind_speed_9am" REAL /* Median wind speed at 9am */,
  "median_humidity_3pm" REAL /* Median humidity at 3pm */,
  "median_temp_3pm" REAL /* Median temperature at 3pm */,
  "median_wind_speed_3pm" REAL /* Median wind speed at 3pm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the median data was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the median data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("median_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_median_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_max" (
  "max_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data that the maximums are for */,
  "max_humidity_9am" REAL /* Maximum humidity at 9am */,
  "max_temp_9am" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 9am */,
  "max_wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed */,
  "max_wind_speed_9am" REAL /* Maximum wind speed at 9am */,
  "max_humidity_3pm" REAL /* Maximum humidity at 3pm */,
  "max_temp_3pm" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 3pm */,
  "max_wind_speed_3pm" REAL /* Maximum wind speed at 3pm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maximum data was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maximum data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("max_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_max_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
